Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:33:16 a.m. and concluding at 09"39:05 a.m.

Plaintiff Recology, Inc. represented by Danielle Otero, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant john Reynolds not appearing.

Custodian of Records is not available.
Plaintiff's request for continuance is GRANTED.

Court determines that $21,000.00 is referenced in Paragraph 13 of the Complaint but is not indicated in the Plaintiff's Prayer for Relief.

Defendant must be served with amended complaint or statement of damages.

There is no evidence of how many hours Plaintiff's Counsel worked on this case and its Declaration for Attorney's Fees is not sufficient.

Additionally, there is no evidence of damages, only a conclusionary statement and no memorandum of costs on file.

Court orders matter continued to Jul-12-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 for Plaintiff to cure all issues, appearance of custodian of records, and further hearing.
